mnemonics.title: PAPA
mnemonics.content: PAPA: Public, All. Protected, Package+Kids. Private, Personal. Default, Direct Package.

mnemonics.title: PACK
mnemonics.content: PACK: Public (all), Accessible; Protected (package+kids), Careful; Default (direct package), Keep; Private (personal), Confidential.

mnemonics.title: Access Levels
mnemonics.content: Please Protect Dad's Privacy: Public, Protected, Default, Private.
